mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_department_score WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_department_score (`year_month`, supplier_name, department, dimension_group, dimension_score, sub_scores, exception_reason, status, file_name) VALUES (#{yearMonth}, #{supplierName}, #{department}, #{dimensionGroup}, #{dimensionScore}, #{subScores}, #{exceptionReason}, #{status}, #{fileName})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_department_score SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sp_department_score SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
